events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: February Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. February session features a short pose session with a single model. Tickets required in advance; no door sales. 18+ ID required. No phones or photos during event.

events.title: Drawing Open Session - March 1, 2026
events.description: Open figure drawing session hosted by RVA Thriving Artists at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

events.title: Evening Figure Drawing
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every second Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2.5 hours. $10 donation at the door. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18.

events.title: Figure Drawing Open Session - March 15, 2026
events.description: Open figure drawing session hosted by RVA Thriving Artists at Art Works. Bring your own materials and easel. Donation pays the model's fee.

events.title: Morning Figure Drawing at Artspace
events.description: Figure Drawing sessions every third Tuesday of the month. Draw a live model for 2 hours. $10 donation at the door. Open session, all skill levels welcome. Must be over 18.

events.title: Figure Drawing Night
events.description: 3-hour figure drawing workshop with a professional nude model. Instructor Carter Helmandollar will call poses beginning with short gestural poses and concluding with longer poses. Bring your own drawing/painting/sculpting materials. No photography permitted.

events.title: Figure Drawing [27]
events.address: 200 N Arthur Ashe Boulevard, Richmond, VA 23220
events.description: Start by exploring a variety of drawings of the human form by other artists. Then with guidance from the instructor and working from a live model, learn to create expressive portraits in charcoal and pencil. Prerequisites: basic drawing skills. Instructor: Amy Smith.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: March Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. March session features a long pose session with a single model. Tickets required in advance; no door sales. 18+ ID required. No phones or photos during event.

events.title: 18+ Figure Drawing: April Session
events.description: Ongoing nude figure drawing series open to all artists 18+. Last Wednesday of the month, 7:45-10pm. Tickets required in advance; no door sales. 18+ ID required. No phones or photos during event.
